response: convert the art collection tax is calculated as two million dollars times twenty percent minus five percent discount on the rate resulting in one hundred eighty thousand dollars. convert the original real estate tax is one hundred thousand for the first million plus three hundred thousand for the next two million plus four hundred thousand for the remaining two million totaling eight hundred thousand dollars. convert the securities tax is three million minus one hundred thousand deduction times fifteen percent resulting in four hundred thirty five thousand dollars. convert the initial total tax liability sums to one million four hundred fifteen thousand dollars. convert the misvaluation error increases the real estate value by ten percent to five point five million dollars. convert the new real estate tax applies ten percent to the first million, fifteen percent to the next two million, and twenty percent to the remaining two point five million totaling nine hundred thousand dollars. convert the adjusted total tax liability becomes one million five hundred five thousand dollars after adding the new real estate tax to the unchanged art and securities taxes.
